M1230_SPEECH M1230 (M0410) Speech And Oral Expression This field indicates the patient's speech and oral (verbal) expression of language in the patient's own language. 00 = Expresses complex ideas, feelings, and needs clearly, completely, and easily in all situations with no observable impairment.
